_comment: Pinned tree-sitter grammar sources for lib/ts.wasm. Maintainer-only. Fetched into ./src (gitignored) by fetch-grammars.sh / `make fetch`. See CLAUDE.md and /docs/research/tsbinding-vendor-on-demand.md.

runtime._note: Pin the commit, not the v0.0.1 tag (5aa45b3, older). Provides the tree-sitter runtime C/headers (src root) plus the grammars listed below. malivvan ships its own src/_gen/grammars.json with deeper per-grammar provenance.

_grammar_header_from_note: External grammars include "tree_sitter/parser.h". Every external grammar repo ships src/tree_sitter/parser.h; the fetch copies it from this one grammar into src/tree_sitter/parser.h so all external grammars resolve it via -I src/.

external._note: ABI 14. a9bdfa3 bumped to ABI 15 — stay on this pin unless the binding is upgraded to match.
